payment_terms: Payment is due by {DUE_DATE} without deduction unless the document states a separate early-payment discount.

quotation.subject: Quotation {DOCUMENT_NUMBER}
quotation.intro: Thank you for your enquiry. We are pleased to offer the goods and services described below.
quotation.closing: This quotation is valid until {VALID_UNTIL}. Please contact us if you have any questions.

order_confirmation.subject: Order confirmation {DOCUMENT_NUMBER}
order_confirmation.intro: Thank you for your order. We confirm fulfillment with the items and terms listed below.
order_confirmation.closing: Please review this order confirmation and notify us promptly of any discrepancy.

delivery_note.subject: Delivery note {DOCUMENT_NUMBER}
delivery_note.intro: The items listed below have been prepared for the stated delivery.
delivery_note.closing: Please check the delivery for completeness and visible transport damage.

advance_invoice.subject: Advance invoice {DOCUMENT_NUMBER}
advance_invoice.intro: We charge the agreed advance payment for order {ORDER_REFERENCE}.
advance_invoice.closing: Please transfer the amount due by {DUE_DATE}, quoting the invoice number.

progress_invoice.subject: Progress invoice {DOCUMENT_NUMBER}
progress_invoice.intro: We charge the following progress payment for partial services completed by {SERVICE_DATE}.
progress_invoice.closing: Please transfer the amount due by {DUE_DATE}, quoting the invoice number.

final_invoice.subject: Final invoice {DOCUMENT_NUMBER}
final_invoice.intro: We issue the final invoice for the completed services, including all advance and progress payments.
final_invoice.closing: Please transfer the remaining amount due by {DUE_DATE}, quoting the invoice number.

invoice.subject: Invoice {DOCUMENT_NUMBER}
invoice.intro: We charge the following items for the goods and services supplied.
invoice.closing: Please transfer the amount due by {DUE_DATE}, quoting the invoice number.

cancellation_invoice.subject: Cancellation invoice {DOCUMENT_NUMBER} for {ORIGINAL_DOCUMENT_NUMBER}
cancellation_invoice.intro: Invoice {ORIGINAL_DOCUMENT_NUMBER} is cancelled in full for the stated reason.
cancellation_invoice.closing: Keep this cancellation invoice together with the referenced original document.

invoice_correction.subject: Invoice correction {DOCUMENT_NUMBER} for {ORIGINAL_DOCUMENT_NUMBER}
invoice_correction.intro: Invoice {ORIGINAL_DOCUMENT_NUMBER} is corrected for the stated reason.
invoice_correction.closing: Keep this invoice correction together with the referenced original document.

commercial_credit_note.subject: Credit note {DOCUMENT_NUMBER}
commercial_credit_note.intro: We credit the following amount for the referenced business transaction.
commercial_credit_note.closing: The credit will be offset against outstanding receivables or refunded using the agreed payment method.

payment_reminder.subject: Payment reminder for {ORIGINAL_DOCUMENT_NUMBER}
payment_reminder.intro: Our records show that invoice {ORIGINAL_DOCUMENT_NUMBER} has not yet been paid in full.
payment_reminder.closing: Please pay the outstanding amount of {OPEN_AMOUNT} {CURRENCY} by {DUE_DATE}. If payment has already been made, please disregard this reminder.

dunning_notice.subject: Dunning notice level {DUNNING_LEVEL} for {ORIGINAL_DOCUMENT_NUMBER}
dunning_notice.intro: Invoice {ORIGINAL_DOCUMENT_NUMBER} remains unpaid in full after its due date.
dunning_notice.closing: Please pay the stated total amount by {DUE_DATE}.

self_billing.subject: Self-billed invoice {DOCUMENT_NUMBER}
self_billing.intro: As the recipient of the supply, we account for the services listed below under the agreed self-billing arrangement.
self_billing.closing: Please review this self-billed invoice and notify us promptly of any reasoned objection.
